snippets.comment: He made me feel very comfortable especially when the hardest thing for me is talking to new people. I had lots of fun and learned lots in this class.

Took his class, I really liked it. It was chill and easy, and he genuinely loves to teach. He considers the mental health of students, especially when it comes to anxiety. He's very accommodating and understanding.

I love this professor. He is very understanding and patient with students. The assignment load is fairly light too. Creates a family with the class and a safe space too. Allows cheat sheets for exams.  Take his class.
